titleStmt.title: SII 9.275: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 275. (A.R. No. 321 of 1905.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE INDRANATHASVAMI TEMPLE AT CHINTALAPUTTURU NEAR PUSHPAGIRI, CUDDAPAH TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 1104, Śubhakṛit, Āshāḍha, ba. 8, Vaḍḍavāra, Karkaṭaka-saṅkramaṇa and Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1182 June 24 Thursday; f.d.t. ·45 Karkaṭa-saṅkrānti occuring on the 27th. It records that the chief Chiddaṇadēva “lord of Kāṅchī” made a gift of some plots of land in Kōḍūru in Muḷki-nāḍu for the service of the god Indrēśvaradēva of Puḻpagiri, after washing the feet of Pāleyamallaya, son of Śaṅkaradēva. It also records the gift of some wet land made by the minister, Vararāja-Nāyaka, to the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti yanēkamahīmaṁḍaḷarājādhirāja paramēśvara paramavaṁśōdbhavaṁ śrī
vriṣabhalāṁcchanaṁ pallavakuḷatilaka bhāradvājagōtra lalitārddhacaṁdraṁ ce
kaṁdharakalpaṁ karapraghōṣaṇaṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvara kāmakōṭyaṁbikāmahā
dēvīlabdhavaraprasādānēkaripunripatimaṇimakuṭasaṁghaṭṭitacaraṇa
yugala cātuvvarṇnāśramadharmmapratiṣṭhitadigvijayārtthi
mukkaṇnakāḍuviṭṭivaṁśāvatāranuṁ niraṁtarasatyavrataviracita mridu
madhurabhāṣaṇanumanavarataprasannamukha
satatadānasamuditadhavaḷayaśōlaharīpayaḥpūrapūritadigaṁtarā
ḷanuṁ daḷadagōpāḷanu malerāyarakkasanumēkāṁgavīranumappa śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvara tyāgasamudra cīḍpuli ciddaṇadēvamahārājaru sakavarṣa
sāsiradanūṟa nālkeneya subhakritsaṁvatsarada Āśāḍha bahuḷa Aṣṭami va
ḍḍavāradaṁdu karkkāṭasaṁkramāṇa vyatīpāta dinamāge śrīparvvatapaścima
cchāyāyuktamappa puḻpagiriyalli paṁcanadītīrtthada sayaṁbhuliṁgamiṁdrē
śvaradēvara mahāsthānādipatigaḷappa saṁkaradēvana putraru pāleyamalla
yaṁgaḷa kālaṁ karcci Indrēśvaradēvargge nityanivēdyasuprabhātadīvige
gaṁ saṁkalpavāgi tannāḷva muḷkināḍa kōḍūralli Ūra mūḍaṇa basuri
yaṁ rājagōviṁdanu dhārāpūrvvakaṁmāḍi koṭṭaru maṁgaḷa ma
hāśrī . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti śacīpatē saṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . kaṁḍarisida nāgayyaṁ Ayvōja
svasti samastapraśastisahita śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ vara
rājanāyakaru Iṁdrēśvaradēvargge madhyāhnada nivēdyakkaṁ
Āyūrali dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa goravara gadde
Īdharmavanārorvvaru Aḷidavaru gaṁgeyoḷaṁ vāraṇāsiya
lu sāsira kavuleymaṁ sāsira vēdapāragarumuṁ vadhisida pātakakke saluvaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.275 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
